violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer and walk-in cooler fan covers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025
An air gap was lacking at the food prep sinks. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine and slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took items out of service to be washed and sanitized. Ice was discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -shelves under prep tables and service line, -mixer shield, -top of dish machine, -freezer fan blade. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
An air gap was lacking at the food prep sinks and dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2024

The sinks used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024
Foods were observed stored on the floor in the freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024
Milk cooler door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024
At the time of inspection, low boy was at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC informed to take unit out of service until fixed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024
The ceiling tiles in the dish area was observed to be leaking. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the floor mixer have an accumulation of food residue. New Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2023
Two lights beneath the hoods are nonfunctional and need to be repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023
